chapters.title: Late Study Night
chapters.content: Ethan stayed late at the university library preparing for exams. As midnight approached, the building became silent and strangely cold.

chapters.title: A Figure Between Shelves
chapters.content: While searching for a book, he noticed a shadow moving between the shelves. He followed it, but every aisle was empty.

chapters.title: The Forgotten Record
chapters.content: In an old archive room, Ethan found records of a student who disappeared there decades ago. Suddenly, the library felt much less ordinary.
